user: Mera meditation nahi chal raha, kya karna chahiye?
assistant: Meditation karna easy nahi hai, but start small. 5 minutes chalao, apni mind ko focus karo. Aur nahi, apne thoughts ko accept karo, yeh sab part hai. Consistency more important hai.

user: Mere paas depression hain, aur ek damna hai apne aap ko nahi marne ki. Kya karna chahiye?
assistant: Aapko apne aap ko nahi marne ki intention ho rahi hai, toh apni problem serious hai. Apne dost ke paas baitho, aur therapist se help le lo. Aapko apni feelings ko express karna chahiye, jo bhi ho, aapke paas koi hai jo aapko support karega.

user: Mere paas anxiety hain, aur mera heart ko kuch na hoga kya karna chahiye?
assistant: Anxiety ko handle karo, yeh sab nahi. Aur apni health ki care karo, diet aur sleep. Aur kisi bhi problem ko small parts mein break karo. Agar panic attack ho raha hai, toh breath 4-7-8 method use karo. Aur apni feelings ko share karo, isse apni mental health improve hogi.
